summary: Frontend-only mobile responsiveness validation completed on public preview URL for admin pages/modals. Core mobile admin shell, navigation accessibility, booking detail modal, and manual booking modal behaviors passed; desktop smoke test also passed.

integration_issues.flow: Manual booking modal save interaction (empty form test)
integration_issues.issue: Observed a 422 response in browser console when save was triggered without complete valid data; button stayed responsive and modal remained operable.

action_items: Optional: Surface friendlier in-UI validation feedback for manual booking save failures (422) to reduce silent console-only diagnostics.
Optional accessibility cleanup: resolve Radix dialog warning about missing description/aria-describedby on all dialog instances.
critical_code_review_comments: frontend/src/App.js is ~1900 lines and multi-responsibility (>700 guideline), increasing regression risk; split admin/public/features into focused modules.
Console repeatedly logs dialog accessibility warning (missing Description/aria-describedby) during modal usage; fix to keep dialogs standards-compliant and reduce runtime noise.
seed_data_creation: Potentially created 1 manual booking record during save-button tappability check; one booking detail save action was also triggered with existing values.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested on REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL public endpoint at 390x844 and 1920x1080. Mobile nav container is horizontally scrollable (clientWidth 308, scrollWidth 1110) and links remain reachable. Booking + manual modals fit viewport (~x=8,y=33,w=374,h=776) with stacked action buttons (~w=343,h=46 each) and zero overlap.
rca of the issue: No blocking responsiveness defect reproduced for requested scope. Minor 422 console event is likely expected backend validation when attempting save with incomplete manual-booking payload, not a mobile layout/tap target failure.
